protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained forced exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTCUSDT/BTC only unless explicitly changed by user
protocol.feature_inputs: External explanatory variables are allowed if merged causally: DXY, kimchi, USDKRW, Upbit BTC, BTC derivatives, and optionally other-coin lead/lag. They do not imply changing the traded asset.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: Feature/gate discoveries are promoted into alpha_pool only when a combined strategy clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=2.5; live-grade standalone requires >=3.0.

feature_tiers.alpha_feature: Strictly promoted feature family: directly tied to strategy-level edge. Requires a combined strategy using this feature to clear test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5, or a standalone/live-grade strategy using it to clear >=3.0, with nontrivial trades and reproducible recipe.
feature_tiers.beta_feature: Potential alpha-feature pool: plausible edge remains, but current evidence has not met alpha-feature promotion threshold. Use for selector/gate/exit experiments with strict contamination notes.
feature_tiers.gamma_feature: Strict noise/failure pool: only for feature families where evidence strongly shows the attempted usage is noise/invalid/repeatedly non-causal. Gamma means avoid similar retries unless the recorded disqualifying evidence is overturned.

beta_to_alpha_feature: A reproducible strategy using the feature clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 after 6bp/side, strict in-position MDD, split-end forced close.
Trade support is not trivial: normally test2024 >=20 trades and eval2025 >=15 trades, unless explicitly marked sparse low-frequency and manually accepted.
Eval2025 is not clearly broken: positive CAGR and no obvious MDD explosion; live-grade standalone requires CAGR/strict_MDD >=3.0.
Feature contribution is identifiable versus baseline/no-feature variant or portfolio marginal contribution.
generation_recipe and usage evidence are complete.
beta_to_gamma_feature: Requires strong evidence that the attempted feature family/usage is only noise, not merely below current alpha/live thresholds.

Acceptable evidence: repeated broad + targeted scans show no robust positive test/eval structure and no useful selector contribution; or leakage/no-op/causal invalidation; or consistent regime inversion/OOS collapse across independent variants.
Gamma entry must name the exact failed usage mode. If a different usage mode remains plausible, keep that feature family in beta and put only the failed search set/provenance in gamma.
Do not gamma-demote broad inventories or search sets just because they are not alpha features; they should be provenance unless they encode a failed/noisy usage mode.
Do not gamma-demote because live-grade is missing; beta is for remaining alpha-feature possibility.
gamma_to_beta_feature: Only allowed if new data, corrected methodology, or a materially different usage mode removes the recorded failure reason.
Must show at least one reproducible combined strategy with test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=1.5 and positive eval2025, or strong portfolio-selector contribution before alpha threshold.

entries.name: All alpha-research feature inventory
entries.trading_target_asset: BTC unless explicitly changed by user
entries.description: Generated exhaustive inventory of feature-like columns, gates, semantic market-state tokens, and cache columns used across prior alpha/portfolio research scripts. This is the recall layer; curated feature entries hold status/evidence.

preventing repeated feature omission
auditing whether a proposed feature family was already tried
known_failures: Generated inventory may include a few non-feature identifiers and dynamically built wildcard stems; curated pool entries remain authoritative for promotion/rejection status
entries.evidence: Built from 43 alpha/portfolio/wave/REX/LLM research source files and market cache columns; includes DXY, kimchi, USDKRW, OI, taker, wave, REX, Alpha101, VPIN, volume, portfolio selector, and semantic state tokens.
entries.leakage_notes: Inventory records use, not safety. Each feature still needs causal/asof/leakage review before reuse.
entries.next_action: Use only as source map; promote/demote specific feature families, not the whole inventory.

generation_recipe.command:
python - <<'PY'
from training.search_vpin_formulaic_alpha import load_market_and_splits, add_vpin_formulaic_features
from training.search_alpha101_derivative_alphas import add_features
m,base,_,_=load_market_and_splits(); a=add_features(m); v=add_vpin_formulaic_features(m, base); print(a.shape, v.shape)
PY

entries.name: REX taker-sell / non-high seven-day range state
entries.description: Joint REX selector state combining completed-bar taker sell pressure with BTC location below the upper extreme of its trailing 2,016-bar (seven-day) high/low range.
feature_examples: joint state is evaluated only after a fixed REX reclaim q75 candidate fires
usable_for: conditional selector for REX reclaim candidates
order-flow plus long-range-location state token for compact LLM/RLLM policies
fresh-OOS shadow feature candidate with frozen thresholds
known_failures: The connected strategy reaches only 2.07 CAGR/strict-MDD in the 2024 selection window, below the 2.5 alpha-feature promotion threshold.
Eval 2025 is positive but weak at 1.71 CAGR/strict-MDD and approximate p=0.247.
The conjunction is not a standalone entry signal; it is conditional on a pre-existing REX reclaim candidate.
entries.evidence: With a fixed REX reclaim q75 candidate, next-open entry, 144-bar hold, 0.5x and 6bp/side, the frozen conjunction records 2024 +12.91% return / ratio 2.07 / 65 trades; 2025 +4.51% / ratio 1.71 / 31 trades; 2026 through Jun 02 +6.98% / ratio 10.14 / 23 trades; combined 2025-2026 +11.80% / CAGR 8.20% / strict MDD 2.63% / ratio 3.12 / 54 trades / approximate p=0.021.
entries.leakage_notes: Both inputs use the signal-time completed 5m bar and trailing bars only; execution starts at the next 5m open. Primitive thresholds were fit from train feature quantiles and the conjunction was ranked on train plus 2024, not on 2025-2026. The broader research path remains retrospective, so later-window results are supporting evidence rather than clean final proof.
entries.tier_rationale: Beta feature candidate: the joint state has plausible and statistically encouraging later-window selector evidence, but the linked strategy misses the required 2024 CAGR/strict-MDD 2.5 promotion threshold.
entries.next_action: Freeze both thresholds, verify live/offline feature parity, and collect fresh shadow OOS without further 2025-2026 tuning; promote only after the documented beta-to-alpha criteria are met.

generation_recipe.protocol: Signal-time completed 5m features; next-open execution; one position; 144-bar hold; 0.5x; 6bp/side; corrected intraposition high-water strict MDD; full-calendar CAGR.
generation_recipe.notes: taker_imbalance = 2 * taker_buy_base / volume - 1. rex_2016_range_pos = 2 * (close - trailing_2016_low) / (trailing_2016_high - trailing_2016_low) - 1. Keep the continuous raw inputs available to the LLM/RLLM; the binary conjunction is a candidate state, not proof that information outside the thresholds is useless.

entries.name: Completed-hour ordinal complexity and transition-surprise features
entries.description: Causal order-3/order-4 hourly price permutation IDs, normalized permutation entropy, pattern surprise, conditional transition surprise and ordinal endpoint direction over 168h/720h histories.
usable_for: continuous regime/complexity token for compact LLM or RLLM
fresh-OOS state input in a separately frozen model
price-action context independent of magnitude-based momentum and realized volatility
known_failures: Static low-entropy continuation reversed from +30.16%/ratio 3.15 in 2024 to -10.49%/ratio -0.47 in 2025.
Static high-entropy reversal lost money in 2024 and 2025.
No standalone frozen policy passed alpha-pool or strong-shadow gates.
entries.evidence: All 12 continuous entropy/surprise variants had max pre-2023 |Spearman rho| <=0.1599 versus sign entropy, autocorrelation, variance ratio, path efficiency and vol-term references. The strongest static use had a genuine 2024 pocket (68 trades, p≈0.038) but failed temporal generalization.
entries.leakage_notes: Feature thresholds and policy selection were pre-2024 with physical row truncation; current patterns/transitions are excluded from their own historical probability estimates; completed hour H is exposed only at H+1h. Later-window evidence now contaminates these exact static mappings.
entries.tier_rationale: Beta: demonstrably distinct and economically active in one full OOS year, but temporally unstable and not alpha-grade. Preserve continuous features, not the failed binary policies.
entries.next_action: Use only in a materially different predeclared regime/RLLM mechanism and require fresh forward proof; do not tune static thresholds on 2024-2026.

generation_recipe.protocol: fit 2020-06..2022; select 2023/H1/H2; frozen replay 2024/2025/2026; completed-hour causal features; next-open; fixed holds; 0.5x; 6bp/side; strict MDD

entries.description: Direct Binance BTC perpetual-versus-spot log basis residualized against the completed Binance premium index with a trailing shifted OLS, plus causal return-residual, futures-flow and spot-participation states.
data_sources: Binance premium-index 1m bars aggregated to complete 5m
usable_for: independent continuous microstructure context for compact LLM/RLLM
fresh-forward state input after live spot data parity
research on nonlinear state-dependent usage, not static direction rules
known_failures: Both contraction directions produced zero eligible paths before OOS.

entries.name: Dual intrinsic-clock impact-elasticity state
entries.description: Causal hourly state comparing frozen-threshold directional-change event clocks of log price and cumulative signed taker quote flow, with normalized path displacements.
data_sources: BTCUSDT perpetual completed 5m OHLCV and taker-buy quote volume
usable_for: weak event-time impact-elasticity context under a materially different learner
not replaying static widths, windows, dominance ratios, entry mappings or holds
known_failures: Zero of 18 final static policies passed pre-2024 admission.
Top fit CAGR/MDD was -0.05 with 41.36% strict MDD; 2023 CAGR/MDD was 2.20.
At executable 6bp/side the top fit return was -4.83%; gross 0bp fit return was +31.20%, showing excessive turnover sensitivity.
More flexible pre-2024 quantile-tail, onset and recoupling probes were also inspected and weak; all static semantics are contaminated and frozen.
entries.evidence: The selected event-clock map returned +18.84% in 2023 with both halves positive. Its exact direction flip lost -36.94%, and a magnitude-only/no-clock control was almost flat, but fit lost -4.83% and varied sharply by regime.
entries.leakage_notes: Physical pre-2024 cutoff; minute-55 completed decision enters next minute-00 open; path scales are prior-only; flow uses previous completed-hour volume; directional-change thresholds freeze until transition; at most one event per bar.
entries.tier_rationale: Event clocks and direction survive strong ablations at gross level, but executable-cost fit loss, 41.36% strict MDD and regime instability prevent alpha promotion.
entries.next_action: Freeze all static settings. Reuse only continuous event-count/displacement/category tokens in a preregistered learner or on genuinely fresh-forward data.

generation_recipe.protocol: physical pre-2024; 3 DC widths x 3 windows x 2 dominance ratios = 18; first-entry only; next-open; 0.5x; 6bp/side; strict MDD

entries.name: Wasserstein flow-response strain state
entries.description: Causal hourly exact 1D monotone-transport state comparing volatility-normalized return-response distributions under strong aggressive buying versus side-aligned aggressive selling.
data_sources: BTCUSDT perpetual completed 5m OHLCV and taker-buy quote volume
usable_for: weak distributional liquidity-asymmetry context under a materially different learner
not replaying static lookbacks, tails, mappings, onset semantics or holds
known_failures: Zero of eight final static policies passed pre-2024 admission.
Top fit CAGR/MDD was 0.01 with 28.47% strict MDD; 2023 CAGR/MDD was 1.78.
Top policy lost in 2021H2, 2022H1 and 2022H2 despite both 2023 halves being positive.
Two earlier eight-policy pre-2024 flow-tercile/coherence and median-innovation probes were weak; all 24 related static policies are contaminated and frozen.
entries.evidence: The top state returned +12.54% in 2023 and +7.95% in 2023H2. Exact direction flip lost -23.23%; mean-only, moment-state and signed-W1 controls were much weaker in 2023. Fit nevertheless returned only +0.53% at 6bp/side.
entries.leakage_notes: Physical pre-2024 cutoff; fit-only flow and strain thresholds; prior-only volatility scale; completed minute-55 window enters next minute-00 open; no forward labels, neighbors or learned impact model.
entries.tier_rationale: Distribution shape, sign and timing survive strong controls, but near-zero fit risk efficiency, 28.47% strict MDD, cost sensitivity and regime losses prevent alpha promotion.
entries.next_action: Freeze static WFRS policies. Reuse only continuous transport tokens in a preregistered learner or with genuinely fresh-forward evidence.

generation_recipe.protocol: physical pre-2024; 2 lookbacks x 2 fit-only tails x 2 holds = 8 final policies; disclosed 16 precursor probes; next-open; 0.5x; 6bp/side; strict MDD

entries.name: Multi-anchor causal-cone rupture spectrum
entries.description: Hourly causal ensemble of prior price anchors projecting square-root-time volatility cones, summarized by directional excess mass, breached-anchor fraction and side.
usable_for: weak multi-anchor information-front context under a materially different learner
not replaying static frozen/current-volatility rules, histories, tails, mappings or holds
known_failures: Zero of eight static policies passed fit-and-2023 admission.
Top fit CAGR/MDD was 0.05 with 25.24% strict MDD; 2023 CAGR/MDD was 2.65.
The top policy lost -22.30% in 2021H1 and 2023H2 ratio was only 0.47.
Current-volatility and breach-fraction controls improved 2023 but still had fit ratios below 1, showing that the frozen-volatility interpretation is not uniquely supported.
entries.evidence: The top frozen-cone state returned +22.42% in 2023 with both halves positive. Exact direction flip lost -31.03%, and a single-horizon return-z control returned only +8.88%; multi-anchor geometry contains directional information but not stable executable alpha.
entries.leakage_notes: Physical pre-2024 cutoff; each anchor scale ends before anchor; all anchors precede decision; fit-only rupture thresholds; completed minute-55 signal; next-open execution; no future labels.
entries.tier_rationale: Strong direction/ensemble ablations and positive 2023 breadth justify weak beta, but low fit efficiency, 25.24% MDD, broad timing and regime loss prevent alpha promotion.
entries.next_action: Freeze static cone policies. Reuse only continuous mass/fraction/side/count tokens in a preregistered learner or on genuinely fresh-forward data.

generation_recipe.protocol: physical pre-2024; 2 histories x 2 fit-only tails x 2 holds = 8; hourly frozen anchor cones; next-open; 0.5x; 6bp/side; strict MDD

entries.name: Causal-cone breach age-front state
entries.description: Hourly causal dynamics of which prior-anchor generations are breached, including directional excess mass, weighted age front, age centroid, old-mass share and their lagged velocities.
usable_for: weak dynamic expectation-invalidation context under a materially different learner
not replaying q80 score tails, lags, holds, propagation mapping or retreat controls
known_failures: Zero of four static age-front policies passed pre-2024 admission.
Top fit CAGR/MDD was 0.07 with 17.17% strict MDD; 2023 CAGR/MDD was 0.70.
The top policy lost in 2021H1 and 2021H2, and approximate fit mean-return p-value was 0.797.
Mass-growth-only was stronger in 2023, while current-volatility rewriting was not weaker, so neither age ordering nor frozen-anchor semantics is uniquely identified.
entries.evidence: The top 6h-lag/12h-hold policy returned +2.82% fit and +5.16% in 2023 with both 2023 halves positive. Exact direction flip lost -14.39%/-9.29%, a seven-day delayed placebo lost -5.43%/-0.25%, and reversed age order became too sparse, indicating local directional information but not alpha-grade execution.
entries.leakage_notes: Physical pre-2024 cutoff; every anchor precedes decision; each anchor scale ends before that anchor; fit-only q80 positive-score threshold; completed minute-55 decision; next-open execution; no labels or future neighbors.
entries.tier_rationale: Direction and time-locality survive exact controls, but low fit/2023 risk efficiency, regime losses, weak significance and non-unique age/frozen-vol interpretations prevent alpha promotion.
entries.next_action: Freeze the entire static age-front family. Reuse only continuous age-spectrum tokens in a preregistered learner or on genuinely fresh-forward data.

entries.name: Preisach relay flow-scar state
entries.description: Causal persistent price-relay lattice carrying per-domain normalized aggressive-flow scars, relay ages, magnetization and coherent multi-relay Barkhausen avalanche state.
data_sources: BTCUSDT perpetual completed 5m OHLCV and taker-buy quote volume
usable_for: path-dependent price/flow memory tokens under a materially different learner
not replaying the 12h field, q80 static release mapping, scar direction rule or 6h hold
known_failures: The single primary static policy returned only +1.68% in fit and lost -10.49% in 2023.
Both 2023 halves lost and fit approximate mean-return p-value was 0.821.
Exact direction flip was positive in 2023 but ratio was only 0.65 and 2023H2 still lost.
Same-direction scar was positive in both full windows but ratios were only 0.04/0.24 and 2023H2 lost.
entries.evidence: Memory erasure (-64.30% fit), scar removal (-17.51%), and seven-day delayed flow (-14.57%) were dramatically worse than the primary +1.68% fit result, showing genuine path-dependent structure; nevertheless the primary side mapping inverted in 2023 and is not executable alpha.
entries.leakage_notes: Physical pre-2024 cutoff; prior-only price center/scale and quote denominator; relay scars scored through t-1 then reset before current flow is stored; completed-close signal enters next open; no outcome labels.
entries.tier_rationale: Strong memory/scar ablations justify preserving the representation, but sign instability, low significance, cost sensitivity and failed 2023 prevent alpha promotion.
entries.next_action: Freeze all static settings. Reuse only continuous relay/scar/avalanche tokens in a preregistered state learner or on genuinely fresh-forward data.

generation_recipe.protocol: physical pre-2024; one fixed 12h-field q80 policy; 12-relay Preisach lattice; next-open; 0.5x; 6bp/side; strict MDD
